channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Police credit a good Samaritan for ending a deadly shooting at a Rhode Island ice rink
item.description: A gunman who opened fire at a Rhode Island youth hockey game, killing two adults and injuring three others, was stopped after a spectator intervened.

item.title: Minnesota’s Legislature braces for a federal immigration fight as the enforcement surge winds down
The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
